cases.title: Case 01 — The Last Clean Take
cases.logline: A celebrated audiobook narrator is found dead the night before her biggest release — but the "new" recordings were made in a room that no longer exists.

cases.title: Case 02 — Room 114: The Quiet Hours
cases.logline: A retired nurse dies in an "AI-optimized" care home. Nobody poisoned her — somebody tuned the staffing algorithm so no one would come.

cases.title: Case 03 — The Salvage Room
cases.logline: A flood drowns a crime lab; the "recovered" evidence convicts a man your dead partner swore was framed.
